items.name: ✨New Year Mandarin Collar Embroidery 囍Dress-Red
items.description:
✨New Year Mandarin Collar Embroidery 囍Dress-Red

"囍"
Pronunciation: Shuāngxǐ (Shwang-shee)
Meaning: Double Happiness.
Cultural Context: This is the specific symbol for Weddings and Marriage. It is formed by two "Happy" (喜) characters standing side-by-side to represent the couple.

A stylish fusion of traditional and modern fashion. Features a mandarin collar top with lantern sleeves and a detailed embroidery chest design, paired with a chic pleated skirt. Perfect for your modern hanfu or street style avatar.

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Mandarin&Category=1&CreatorName=Lucky+Koi+Kreation&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1
